novel_features.name: Vibe recipes
novel_features.description: Save prompt + tag + persona + model bundles as named recipes and replay them with one-line topic substitution.
novel_features.rationale: Local SQLite recipe store; no existing Suno tool persists tag recipes - paperfoot, slauger, and gcui-art all ship stateless generate.
novel_features.why_it_matters: When an agent needs the same vibe applied to many topics, this beats re-pasting tags every call.

novel_features.name: A/B variant auto-picker
novel_features.description: Suno returns two clip variants per generation; this auto-ranks them on duration match, lyrics-word-count, and bitrate, downloads only the winner.
novel_features.rationale: The dual-variant pattern is unique to Suno's API; no absorbed tool exposes mechanical winner-picking.
novel_features.example: suno generate create --gpt-description-prompt "30 second piano interlude" --pick best --target-duration 30 --json
novel_features.why_it_matters: Half of Suno's credit spend goes to the variant you ignore; agents that pick mechanically reclaim it.

novel_features.name: Credit burn analytics
novel_features.description: Cross-table aggregation showing credits spent by tag, persona, model, or hour-of-day over a window.
novel_features.rationale: Joins local credits_snapshots against generations table; no API endpoint returns this and paperfoot's credits only reports point-in-time balance.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents asking "how much did we spend on test runs today?" need this; existing wrappers cannot answer.

novel_features.name: Persona leaderboard
novel_features.description: Ranks the user's voice personas by which produced the most-liked, most-played, or most-extended clips.
novel_features.rationale: Joins clips.persona_id against personas + aggregates like_count, play_count, child-clip count; no wrapper exposes persona-level analytics.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Tells the user which voice has been working for them so they invest credits in winners, not duds.

novel_features.name: Lineage tree
novel_features.description: Walks parent_id and direct_children recursively to render the ASCII tree of an extend/concat/cover/remaster ancestry.
novel_features.rationale: Recursive CTE over local clips.parent_id; Suno web shows lineage one hop at a time.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Find the head of a remix chain, see every variant of a song concept in one view.

novel_features.name: Reachability self-test
novel_features.description: Beyond standard health checks: fires a zero-credit lyrics-only generation to confirm the live generate path is reachable and not intercepted by CAPTCHA.
novel_features.rationale: Brief Reachability Risk section cites 5+ open issues on gcui-art about CAPTCHA / auth expiration; this proactively detects them.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents running scheduled music tasks must distinguish 'auth expired' from 'Suno offline'; this is the only tool that does it.

novel_features.name: Credit-budget guard
novel_features.description: Sets a daily or monthly credit cap; generate refuses to submit when the projected spend would exceed the cap.
novel_features.rationale: Reads /api/billing/usage-plan and joins local generations.created_at for month-to-date spend; no absorbed feature gates spend.
novel_features.example: suno budget set monthly 1500 && suno generate "..." --max-spend 50
novel_features.why_it_matters: Prevents an agent in a runaway loop from burning the user's whole quota.

novel_features.name: Prompt evolution
novel_features.description: Takes an existing clip's full parameter bundle and mutates one axis (tag, persona, model) for a focused re-roll.
novel_features.rationale: Brief Top Workflows #1 + #3; user vision; absorbed extend/remaster/cover each mutate one axis but require remembering the right verb.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Casey's tweak-and-reroll ritual becomes one command instead of three clicks.

novel_features.name: Ship pack
novel_features.description: One-shot publishing bundle: MP3 with ID3+USLT+SYLT, MP4, cover PNG, LRC subtitle, JSON sidecar of metadata.
novel_features.rationale: Brief Top Workflow #5 emphasizes embedded metadata; community wrappers do bulk download but not the editor-ready pack.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Content creator prepping a CapCut import needs every artifact at once; one command versus a download chain.

novel_features.name: Reroll until match
novel_features.description: Resubmits a prompt until a returned variant lands in the requested duration window or attempts run out.
novel_features.rationale: Empirical 429s on >3 simultaneous generations + TikTok's 30-45s slot is a real content-creator constraint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Mechanically achieves what manual re-clicking does in the web app, with budget enforcement.

novel_features.name: Sessionized history
novel_features.description: Groups recent generations into ~30-minute-gap sessions and reports per-session credit spend, persona usage, and tag drift.
novel_features.rationale: Window function over local generations.created_at; Suno web has no session view.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents and humans alike can ask "what did I work on last Tuesday afternoon?" against their library.

narrative.headline: Every Suno feature, plus a local SQLite library, offline FTS5 search, MCP-native agent surface, and a single-binary Go install.
narrative.value_prop: Every Suno workflow lands in a single Go binary: generate from a prompt, extend, concat, remaster, download with embedded lyrics and cover art. On top of that, every clip you generate syncs to a local SQLite store so you can list your library offline, run cross-table SQL queries, build vibe recipes that compound across sessions, and watch your credit burn by tag or persona. The built-in MCP server exposes the whole surface over stdio and HTTP so agents reach Suno through one orchestration pair instead of 30 raw tools.
narrative.auth_narrative: Suno has no official API. Auth is Clerk: import your `__session` cookie from Chrome with `suno auth login --chrome` and the CLI sends `Authorization: Bearer <__session>` on every request. The CLI refreshes the JWT in the background by exchanging the longer-lived `__client` cookie against `clerk.suno.com`. If your browser session is signed in, the CLI is signed in.

quickstart.comment: Import your logged-in Suno session from Chrome (no API key needed).
Confirm auth works and the live generate path is reachable (zero-credit probe).
Pull your existing clip library into the local SQLite store.

quickstart.command: suno generate create --gpt-description-prompt "a synthwave anthem about debugging at 3am" --pick best --json
quickstart.comment: Generate a new song; auto-rank the two returned variants; emit JSON for downstream agents.
List your library from the local SQLite store with narrow fields for agent context.
Show credit spend by tag for the last 30 days from the local store.

troubleshoots.symptom: 401 Unauthorized after working for an hour
troubleshoots.fix: JWT expired. Run `suno auth refresh` (or `suno auth refresh --watch` to auto-refresh in the background).
Suno's anti-bot intercepted the request. The CLI auto-retries via Surf Chrome fingerprint; if it persists, run `suno doctor --probe-generate` to confirm reachability.
Poll with `suno status <clip-id> --wait` (default timeout 5min). Suno's queue can take 60-180 seconds.
Ensure you're signed in to suno.com in Chrome. If using a different browser, set `SUNO_TOKEN` env var with your `__session` cookie value.

troubleshoots.symptom: Credits remaining drops faster than expected
troubleshoots.fix: Each generation = 10 credits and returns 2 variants. Use `--pick best` to mechanically download only the winner, or `--target-duration` to skip rerolls.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for suno-pp-cli when you need agent-controlled music generation against your real Suno account: producing background music for video, building music-aware workflows, exploring prompt evolutions, analyzing your credit burn by tag, or running an MCP-served music tool that any LLM-driven host can call. Skip it when you only need one-off song generation - the suno.com web UI is faster for single tracks. Skip it when you need to access someone else's Suno library; the CLI authenticates as the logged-in user only.

recipes.title: Generate a song and ship it ready for CapCut
recipes.command: suno generate create --gpt-description-prompt "upbeat lo-fi for product demo" --pick best --wait --target-duration 60 --json
recipes.explanation: Generates, waits for completion, ranks the two returned variants by duration distance to 60s, and prints the winner. Pipe the returned id into 'suno ship <id> --to ./demo-bgm/' to bundle MP3 + MP4 + cover + LRC + JSON sidecar.

recipes.title: Save and reuse a vibe recipe
recipes.command: suno vibes save synthwave-banger --tags "synthwave, female vocal, melancholic" --mv chirp-v5 --persona-id <id> && suno vibes use synthwave-banger "another rainy night" --json
recipes.explanation: Persists the recipe to local SQLite; future invocations swap in any topic without remembering the tag list.

recipes.title: Audit credit spend by tag for the last month
recipes.explanation: Joins local credits_snapshots against generations; uses dotted-path select to keep the agent's context small.

recipes.title: Find the lineage of a remix
recipes.explanation: Walks parent_id and direct_children to render the extend/concat/cover ancestry. Replace <clip-id> with one of your synced clips from 'suno clips list'.

recipes.title: Reroll until a clip fits a TikTok slot
recipes.explanation: Loops generation until a variant lands in the duration window, capped at 50 credits, picking the winner each time.

trigger_phrases: how many credits have I burned
